scope: slice 10 ci: checks, polling, readiness, remediation, monitor
exclusion_rationale: 25 surviving mutants are all inherent equivalent: PollPolicy default/kwarg mutations (tests construct PollPolicy explicitly), StubCiMonitor view_factory() call mutations (tests don't exercise client path), PullRequestCheck attribute access mutations (tests verify through other attributes), Pydantic model constructor mutations (tests assert on attributes), PollOutcome enum reference mutations (tests use the enum class). Same mutmut AST-only-RHS limitation as slices 5-9.
